data.body:
#Asha'sNotes 
I really just wanted to draw. 
Just a few strokes, I thought, but the world knows me too well. 
A line became a word, a word became a rule. 
Suddenly, I found myself in the middle of a linguistic reordering.
Sometimes my world moves faster than my hands can keep up.
